sections.label: Short Term (Today through Tomorrow)
sections.text: High pressure building across the southern plains will bring dry and pleasant conditions to Oklahoma through the weekend. Temperatures will run near seasonal normals with highs in the mid 60s across central Oklahoma. Overnight lows will drop into the lower 40s.

sections.label: Long Term (Sunday onward)
sections.text: This forecast presents no risk of hazardous weather impacts across Oklahoma or Texas and or any neighboring states, with conditions expected to remain stable throughout the period.

sections.label: Fire Weather
sections.text: No critical fire weather concerns at this time. Relative humidity values will remain adequate and wind speeds will stay below advisory thresholds through the weekend.

sections.label: Aviation
sections.text: VFR conditions expected at all Oklahoma terminals through Sunday. Ceilings and visibilities will remain well above minimums. Winds will be light and variable.
